title: SEWER SHALLOWS
blurb: Bleecker access tunnel. Knee-deep, warm. The fish in there shouldn't be fish anymore. Bring the sawed-off. Don't slip.
briefing: The water is warm. It shouldn't be warm. Things underneath choose the surface. Sawed-off, full bandolier, do not ration. The pipefitter's tag you'll find belonged to a man who has been dead twenty-one years. Put it in your pocket anyway.
epigraph: "DiSalvo Plumbing & Iron, est. 1938. Date of last inspection scratched out. Replaced with a question mark."
